# DropletOff

## Tags
water, weather, liquid, fluid, wet, moisture, damp, bead, globule

## Categories
weather, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/droplet-off)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::DropletOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        DropletOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
